title: a minecraft horror resource pack.. kinda
description: this is a resource pack (or a texture pack lol) made in Blockbench
body:
A Resource Pack that makes the entities horror style

READ:
A. what does this add? This texture pack makes the enderman model horror style, but kinda sucks
B. why should someone want to download the project? Honestly, you can use this in videos, just include the resource pack in the description 
C. any other critical information the user must know before downloading:
Use OptiFine for it to work, I really recommend 1.21.1, havent tested others yet

**How to use:**
1. Download the .zip file
2. unzip it
3. Put into **C:\Users\YourUser\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks** **Remember to change YourUser to your user (PC)**
4. Turn it on in Esc > Options > Resource Packs (Minecraft obviously)
Done!
**Etc**
More coming soon
